# 🗑️ Real Trash Analysis — NYC Waste Sorting

---

## Photo 1 — Dunkin' Bin

![Photo 1 — Dunkin' Bin](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Dunkin' green paper cups with plastic lids | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Clear PET plastic cold drink cup (Dunkin') | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Plastic cup lids | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Orange plastic straw | 🗑️ Trash |
| Wooden spoon | 🌱 Compost |
| Brown crumpled paper bag (food-stained) | 🌱 Compost |
| Silver aluminum can | ♻️ Recyclable |
| Gray plastic liner bag | 🗑️ Trash |
| Crumpled napkins/tissue paper | 🌱 Compost |

---

## Photo 2 — Mixed Drinks Bin

![Photo 2 — Mixed Drinks Bin](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Clear plastic cups with lids (drink residue inside) | ♻️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Black plastic takeout containers | 🗑️ Trash — black plastic not accepted in NYC |
| White plastic straw | 🗑️ Trash |
| Red plastic straw | 🗑️ Trash |
| Green plastic straw | 🗑️ Trash |
| Used cloth/towel | 🗑️ Trash |
| Paper label/receipt | 🗑️ Trash |
| Gray plastic liner bag | 🗑️ Trash |
| N95/KN95 mask | 🗑️ Trash |

---

## Photo 3 — Broom & Bags

![Photo 3 — Broom & Bags](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Black plastic garbage bag | 🗑️ Trash |
| White plastic bags (multiple) | 🗑️ Trash — or drop off at supermarket plastic bag recycling |
| Broom / brush (red handle, black bristles) | 🗑️ Trash — bulk item if oversized |
| Used paper towels / tissues (white crumpled) | 🗑️ Trash |
| Brown cloth / glove (top center) | 🗑️ Trash |
| Printed paper sign ("Donation Just $5") | ♻️ Recyclable — if clean and dry |

---

## Photo 4 — Plastic Bottle & Wrapper

![Photo 4 — Plastic Bottle & Wrapper](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Smartwater / Evian plastic bottle (crushed) | ♻️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Crunch chocolate bar wrapper | 🗑️ Trash — foil/mixed material wrapper |
| Clear plastic liner bag | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |

---

## Photo 5 — CRT Monitor Bin

![Photo 5 — CRT Monitor Bin](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Plastic bottle with red cap | ♻️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Clear plastic clamshell container (food residue) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Old CRT monitor / electronic device (green/gray) | ⚠️ E-Waste — drop off at NYC e-waste collection site |
| Chips bag (Doritos / blue snack bag) | 🗑️ Trash — foil/mixed material |
| Crumpled paper / receipt | 🗑️ Trash — too soiled |
| Clear plastic liner bag | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |

---

## Photo 6 — Dunkin' Bag & Snacks

![Photo 6 — Dunkin' Bag & Snacks](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Dunkin' paper bag (food-stained) | 🌱 Compost |
| Cheez-It / cheese cracker snack bag (open, spilled) | 🗑️ Trash — foil/mixed material |
| Small aluminum can (bottom left) | ♻️ Recyclable |
| Plastic snack cup with lid (red, Lays/cracker brand) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |

---

## Photo 7 — Seafood Bag

![Photo 7 — Seafood Bag](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Brown paper bag (seafood restaurant, food-stained) | 🌱 Compost |
| Aluminum can (bottom left) | ♻️ Recyclable |
| White cup/container (right) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Black plastic garbage bag | 🗑️ Trash |

---

## Photo 8 — Fruit & Cup

![Photo 8 — Fruit & Cup](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Clear plastic cup with lid (drink residue) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Mango / yellow fruit (food waste) | 🌱 Compost |
| Blue QR code sticker/label | 🗑️ Trash |
| White napkins / tissue (used) | 🌱 Compost |
| Clear plastic liner bag | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |

---

## Photo 9 — Ritz & Pizza Box

![Photo 9 — Ritz & Pizza Box](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Dunkin' cup (orange, with straw) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Clear plastic bottle (Sprite/soda) | ♻️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Clear plastic clamshell (muffins/baked goods inside) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Small cardboard box ("Ritz") | ♻️ Recyclable — if dry and clean |
| Dunkin' paper bag | 🌱 Compost |
| White plastic bag | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |
| Pizza box (partially visible, "PIZZA" text) | 🌱 Compost — grease-soiled cardboard |
| Black trash can | 🗑️ Trash |
| Food residue / baked goods | 🌱 Compost |

---

## Photo 10 — Pizza Box & McDonald's

![Photo 10 — Pizza Box & McDonald's](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Pizza box (grease-stained, "Thank you / Extra Cheese / Sausage") | 🌱 Compost |
| Receipt / order slip ("Customer" paper) | 🗑️ Trash — thermal paper not recyclable |
| Red can (partially visible, top) | ♻️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| White plastic bag (food-stained) | 🗑️ Trash |
| Black plastic garbage bag | 🗑️ Trash |
| McDonald's wrapper (red/yellow, partially visible) | 🗑️ Trash — foil/mixed material |

---

## Photo 11 — Doritos & Foil

![Photo 11 — Doritos & Foil](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Doritos bag (yellow, foil-lined) | 🗑️ Trash — foil/mixed material |
| Brown paper bag (food-stained) | 🌱 Compost |
| Aluminum foil with food residue (wrapped food) | 🗑️ Trash — too soiled to recycle |
| Food scraps inside foil (bread/bun) | 🌱 Compost |
| Clear plastic bag | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |

---

## Photo 12 — Paper Plates

![Photo 12 — Paper Plates](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Paper plates (food-stained, sauce residue) | 🌱 Compost |
| Metal spoon | ♻️ Recyclable |
| White napkins / paper underneath | 🌱 Compost |

---

## Photo 13 — Beer Bottles & Plates

![Photo 13 — Beer Bottles & Plates](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Paper plates (food-stained) | 🌱 Compost |
| Food scraps / bread / pizza crust | 🌱 Compost |
| Glass beer bottles (Coors Light, Corona) | ♻️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Metal bottle caps | ♻️ Recyclable |
| White napkins (used) | 🌱 Compost |
| Black plastic garbage bag | 🗑️ Trash |

---

## Photo 14 — Starbucks & Bucket

![Photo 14 — Starbucks & Bucket](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Doritos / chips bag (blue, foil) | 🗑️ Trash — foil/mixed material |
| Large white plastic bucket/container | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Clear plastic cup with lid & green straw (Starbucks) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Yellow plastic straw | 🗑️ Trash |
| White plastic bags | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |
| Crumpled paper towels / tissues | 🗑️ Trash |
| Small decorative/plastic items (top left, colorful) | 🗑️ Trash |
| Clear plastic liner bag | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |

---

## Photo 15 — Dumpster

![Photo 15 — Dumpster](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Cardboard box (flat) | ♻️ Recyclable — flatten and keep dry |
| Bud Light beer cans (crushed, multiple) | ♻️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Green plastic bag | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |
| Black plastic garbage bag | 🗑️ Trash |
| Cigarette butts (scattered on floor) | 🗑️ Trash — hazardous, never compost |
| Shredded paper / debris on floor | 🗑️ Trash — too soiled |

---

## Photo 16 — Coffee Cup & Foil

![Photo 16 — Coffee Cup & Foil](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| White paper coffee cup (with lid) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| White paper plate (food-stained) | 🌱 Compost |
| Aluminum foil (food residue) | 🗑️ Trash — too soiled to recycle |
| Food scraps / bread inside foil | 🌱 Compost |

---

## Photo 17 — Overflowing Street Bin

![Photo 17 — Overflowing Street Bin](data:image/png;base64,)

| Item | Category |
| --- | --- |
| Clear plastic water bottle | ♻️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Clear plastic cups with lids (drinks inside) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Plastic straws | 🗑️ Trash |
| Paper cup (brown/coffee, on top) | ⚠️ Recyclable — rinse first |
| Plastic bags (white, stuffed in bin) | 🗑️ Trash — or supermarket drop-off |
| Nikki's Special signage/cardboard | ♻️ Recyclable — if clean and dry |
